'''Lilith''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] trainee who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. When the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] was initiated, she betrayed her fellow [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and joined the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. She then helped hunt down survivors of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] and led the Imperial forces in attacking [[Arrakan]].<ref name="Valk" />

{{Stub}}
